solution:
```
class Solution:
    def clumsy(self, n: int) -> int:
        res, op, v = n, '-', n - 1
        while v > 0:
            if op == '-':
                res -= v
                op, v = '*', v - 1
            elif op == '*':
                res *= v
                op, v = '/', v - 1
            elif op == '/':
                res = res // v
                op, v = '+', v - 1
            else:
                res += v
                op, v = '-', v - 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a simple loop to iterate through the numbers from n to 1, applying the clumsy factorial operations in the correct order. It keeps track of the current result, operation, and value, updating them accordingly in each iteration.
